050.$description: Paper, kept slightly warm on purpose.

600.$description: Soft gray, the former muted step.

700.$description: Muted foreground, dark enough to carry text.

950.$description: Ink, kept slightly cool on purpose.

150.$description: Sans narration, between label and body.

200.$description: Body copy, 17px. N27 is display-leaning, so body runs 1px larger than the 16px default.

scale-mono.$description: The machine voice's size against the surrounding sans. The faces share cap and x-heights; this compensates for the mono's wide set.

sans.$description: The human voice. Everything except code and machine-readable content.

mono.$description: The machine voice: code, token names and values, file paths, terminal output, and structured-data excerpts. Ships in Regular only; never let the browser synthesize a bold.

light.$description: Display only, at sizes above 40px. Never for body copy.

medium.$description: Subheads, nav, labels, and UI chrome.

snug.$description: A touch of tracking on small numeric and label chrome.

wide.$description: Slightly opened tracking on small controls.

tabular.$description: Tabular figures, applied wherever numbers align in columns: tables, token values, stats.

normal.$description: Body leading. N27 is display-leaning, so long-form reading gets extra air.

radius.$description: Sharp by default, one token, applied consistently.

max.$description: Max content measure, the page shell width.
